_meta.join: cityMunCode joined to PSA Q4 2024 PSGC via @ph-dev-utils/core (name + province context)
multizip_topup: Wikipedia 'ZIP codes in the Philippines' (lists Davao City as 8000 + 8016–8026)

schema.zip: 4-digit PHLPost ZIP code (not unique — multi-ZIP cities + shared codes exist)
schema.cityMun: city/municipality (or district/area) name as listed by GeoNames
schema.cityMunCode: 6-digit PSGC parent — joins @ph-dev-utils/core CityMunicipality.code; null when unmatched
schema.province: 4-digit PSGC province code, or null for NCR/HUC
schema.area: district/locality detail for multi-ZIP cities (NCR districts, etc.), else null

notes: ZIP data is community-sourced (GeoNames) + PHLPost-reconciled, NOT an official PHLPost feed.
NCR district-level ZIPs are included; Manila districts roll up to Manila city 133900.
Some provincial multi-ZIP cities (e.g. Davao City) are partial in GeoNames — top-up planned for v0.2.
Geography-less institutional/PO-box ZIPs (e.g. ADB, Camp Crame, SSS) are excluded — not city/municipality localities.
Unmatched entries (cityMunCode null) are mostly barangay-level or spelling-variant places; region/province are still populated where known.

postal_codes.area: Fortune Vil. - Paso De Blas - Gen. T. De Leon
